functionalRequirements.title: Asset Lock
acceptance: User can lock USDC/USDT on a source chain using a non-custodial on-chain contract.
Lock emits an event containing asset, amount, sender, recipient, and nonce.
User receives a transaction receipt and can query lock status.

functionalRequirements.title: Finality Proof Generation
acceptance: Relayer detects lock events and waits chain-specific finality thresholds.
Relayer fetches finalized headers and inclusion data for the lock event.
ZK prover produces a succinct proof that binds: header finality + event inclusion + nonce/recipient/amount commitment.
functionalRequirements.notes: EVM: merkle-inclusion-v1 + confirmations + blockhash check; SNARK prover not yet wired (see zk/README.md).

functionalRequirements.title: Asset Mint
acceptance: Destination chain contract verifies the submitted proof on-chain.
Nonce replay is prevented on destination.
Wrapped asset is minted/released to the recipient.
Mint emits an event including the source reference and recipient.

functionalRequirements.title: Asset Burn
acceptance: User can burn wrapped assets on destination chain.
Burn emits an event containing amount, sender, recipient, and nonce.

functionalRequirements.title: Asset Unlock
acceptance: Relayer detects burn finality and produces a proof of burn inclusion/finality.
Source chain pool releases previously locked assets to recipient.
Nonce replay is prevented on source.
functionalRequirements.notes: EVM: burn watcher + unlockWithInclusionProof on ZkStablesPoolLock; Cardano/Midnight not done.

functionalRequirements.title: Pooled Liquidity Model
acceptance: Separate non-custodial pools exist per chain per asset (USDC, USDT).
Pool balances and accounting are queryable and auditable on-chain.
functionalRequirements.notes: ZkStablesLiquidityVault.sol adds per-token LP shares; external audit still required (evm/AUDIT.md).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Privacy
requirements: Optional privacy mode where proofs do not leak transaction amounts
